General.Name: Ocean Line Port Development Ltd
General.Description: Ocean Line Port Development Limited, an inland terminal operator, provides port logistic services in the People's Republic of China. The company offers uploading and unloading of cargoes, bulk cargo handling, container handling, storage, and other services; and ancillary port services, including temporary storage and short distance road transportation services, as well as miscellaneous services comprising docking and undocking of vessels, and cleaning services for trucks and containers. It operates two port terminals, including Jiangkou Terminal and Niutoushan Terminal located in Chizhou City, Anhui Province. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Chizhou, the People's Republic of China. Ocean Line Port Development Limited is a subsidiary of Vital Force Development Limited.
